name: Iron Curtain
desc: All enemies deal 75% damage (rounded down) for the rest of the run.

name: Opening Gambit
desc: At the start of each battle, a random enemy and a random hero each take 50% of their max HP as damage.

name: Bulwark Aura
desc: Every hero gains 3 shield at the start of each enemy turn.

name: Nanite Field
desc: Every hero heals 3 HP at the start of each enemy turn.

name: Plague Protocol
desc: All enemies begin every battle with 3 damage-over-time.

name: Overcharge
desc: All heroes deal 130% damage on ability hits (rounded up).

name: Signal Jam
desc: All enemies begin every battle with a permanent −2 roll penalty.

name: Coordinated Strike
desc: All heroes begin every battle with a permanent +2 roll bonus.

name: Resonance Cascade
desc: Enemy DoT ticks deal +2 extra damage each tick.

name: Gravity Well
desc: At the start of each enemy turn, all living enemies take 2 damage.

name: Protocol Override
desc: All items cost 0 Protocol for the remainder of the run.

name: Entropy Leak
desc: Enemies lose 5 max HP per battle already cleared when they spawn (−25 to −50 HP for battles 6–10).

name: Chain Reaction
desc: When an enemy dies, all other living enemies take 4 damage.
